steps.t: Cyneberg, stricken by grief from the loss of her father and Thrymm, has asked you to leave her alone. You should help the survivors in Scylfig break t…
Ice shards can be found in front of the door to Oswi's home. You should clear the shards from Oswi's home.
Cyneberg, stricken by grief from the loss of her father and Thrymm, has asked you to leave her alone. You should help the survivors in Scylfig break t…
Ice shards can be found in front of the stable near Portred. You should clear the shards to free Portred's horse.
Cyneberg, stricken by grief from the loss of her father and Thrymm, has asked you to leave her alone. You should help the survivors in Scylfig break t…
Ice shards can be found blocking the door to the barn near Saxburg. You should clear away the shards of ice.
Cyneberg is in Scylfig. You have aided the villagers, and should now see if Cyneberg is recovered enough to speak with you.
